MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF NGO, LAM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR APR-20-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON APR-26-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

CAUSE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. PL. PRESENT W/ARNOLD CHIN AS COUNSEL. DEF. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. SETTLED BY STIP. W/JUDGMENT FOR PL - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 1742 FILLMORE #1, S.F, CA. - UPON CONDITION OF DEF. VACATING BY 5-6-94, PL. WAIVES ALL RENT & DAMAGES - EACH TO BEAR THEIR COSTS & ATTY FEES - IF DEF. DOESN'T VACATE AS AGREED, PL. TO HAVE JUDGMENT BY EXPARTE FOR POSSESSION & $3,979 RENT & DAMAGES. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE NECESSARY PAPERS.
STIPULATION AND ORDER STIP. FOR JUDGMENT & ORDER OF THE COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORON, DEBBIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1742 FILLMORE ST, #1, S.F, CA. $3,970.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,970.00, IF DEF. VACATES AS AGREED THERE IS NO MONEY JUDGMENT. KEYS TO BE LEFT W/PL. ATTY. AT 1732 FILLMORE. EACH SIDE BEARS THEIR COSTS & FEES. NO WASTE COMMETTED ON PREMISES ASIDE FROM NORMAL WEAR & TEAR. SEE FILE FOR COMPLETE JUDGMENT DETAILS.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
